---
title: ""
knit: (function(input_file, encoding) {
  out_dir <- 'docs';
  rmarkdown::render(input_file,
 encoding=encoding,
 output_file=file.path(dirname(input_file), out_dir, 'research.html'))})
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    css: "style.css"
---

<left>

<h1 style="font-size: 40px;">Working Papers</h1>
<br>

<left class="flex-container">
<left> <img src="geo_innovation_pic.png" style="width:100%"> </left>
<right> <span style="font-size:22px"><a href="Weiliang_Tan_SDTC.pdf" target="_blank">**Directed Innovation across Space**</a></font>
<br><br> <span style="font-size:18px"> **Research Question**: How does the geography of innovation respond to changes in economic fundamentals, and what are the consequences for aggregate growth and welfare?
<br><br> **Methodological Contributions**:<br /> 
(1) Introduce endogenous, directed, and microfounded innovation in a<br />dynamic spatial model;<br />
(2) Decompose the welfare impacts from shocks to fundamentals into<br />transitory and long-run growth components
</right>

<br />
<left class="flex-container">
<left> <img src="changing_geo_inno.png" style="width:100%"> </left>
<!--  <right> <span style="font-size:22px"><a href="Weiliang_Tan_GeoInno.pdf" target="_blank">**The Changing Geography of American Innovation**</a></font> -->
<right> <span style="font-size:22px">**The Changing Geography of American Innovation**</font>
<br><br><br> <span style="font-size:18px"> **Research Question**: How has the geography of U.S. innovation changed over time and what are the main drivers of this trend?

<br />
<left class="flex-container">
<left> <img src="ssp245_temp_hist.png" style="width:100%"> </left>
<right> <span style="font-size:22px"><a href="https://osf.io/preprints/socarxiv/usghb" target="_blank">**The Economic Effects of Climate Change in<br>Dynamic Spatial Equilibrium**</a></font>
<br /> (joint with Ivan Rudik, Gary Lyn, Ariel Ortiz-Bobea)   
<br /> <span style="font-size:18px"> <em>**R&R, Journal of Political Economy: Macroeconomics**</em>  
<br /> **Research Question**: What are the welfare effects of general equilibrium adaptation via trade and migration in response to climate change?  
<br /> **Methodological Contributions**:<br /> 
(1) Model-consistent estimating equations to identify climate impacts on productivity and amenities from temperature shocks; <br />
(2) Quantitative decomposition of general equilibrium adaptation channels (trade, migration, industry switching) to shocks in fundamentals in a <br> dynamic spatial model
</right>

<br />
<font-size:40px>
<h1 style="font-size: 40px;">Work in Progress</h1>

<br />
<left class="flex-container">
<left> <img src="geo_vintage_pic.png" style="width:90%"> </left>
<right> <span style="font-size:22px">**The Geography of Technology Vintages**</font> 
<br> (joint with Bernardo Ribeiro, Anh Tran)  
<br><br> <span style="font-size:18px">**Research Question**: Why are newer technology vintages<br> disproportionately created in high-skill regions?
<br><br><br> **Methodological Contribution**: Introduce technology vintages in a <br> dynamic spatial model with endogenous and directed innovation
</right>

<br />
<left class="flex-container">
<left> <img src="coinv_networks_pic.png" style="width:100%"> </left>
<right> <span style="font-size:22px">**The Geography and Spatial Networks of Innovation**</font>
<br><br><br> <span style="font-size:18px"> **Research Question**: What drives the rising intensity of cross-region <br> coinventor networks and what are the aggregate implications?
<!-- <br><br><br> **Intended Methodological Contribution**: Introduce field-specific <br> expertise in a dynamic spatial model with endogenous and directed<br> innovation -->
</right>


<!-- The Dynamic Propagation of Productivity Shocks (with Zebang Xu) -->
